Tests and build script for workout system applications in the Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[test_workout_active.c](test_workout_active.c.md)**: Tests for rendering and functionality of the workout active window in various scenarios.
- **[test_workout_app_includes.h](test_workout_app_includes.h.md)**: Header file for testing the workout app, including fakes, stubs, and helper functions.
- **[test_workout_dialog.c](test_workout_dialog.c.md)**: Tests for rendering different workout dialog states in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_workout_selection.c](test_workout_selection.c.md)**: Tests for the workout selection feature in the Pebble firmware, including setup, rendering, and validation.
- **[test_workout_summary.c](test_workout_summary.c.md)**: Tests for rendering workout summary windows for different activity types in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_workout_utils.c](test_workout_utils.c.md)**: Tests for workout utility functions, including session management and ongoing activity detection.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing workout system applications in the Pebble firmware.
